title: Apple Company Overview
text: Apple Inc. is a technology company best known for designing, manufacturing, and selling consumer electronics, software, and digital services. Its major hardware products include the iPhone, Mac, iPad, Apple Watch, AirPods, Apple TV, and Apple Vision Pro. Apple also earns revenue from services such as the App Store, Apple Music, Apple TV, Apple Pay, iCloud, AppleCare, advertising, and other subscription-based offerings. The company's business model depends on a tightly connected ecosystem of devices, software platforms, and services that encourages customer loyalty and repeat purchases. Apple sells through its own retail and online stores, direct sales teams, wireless carriers, resellers, and third-party retailers. For investment analysis, Apple is important because it combines large-scale hardware sales with a growing high-margin services business.
